reviews.review_description: Just a standard 360 video that does not make you feel like you are there and both eyes get the exact same image so like most 360 videos they are awkward to watch and make you feel sick, this is supposed to be the age where virtual reality is next gen, to me next gen is high resolution 3d separate image per eye to get the full 3d effect,, this was not that and these sort of videos is what put people off getting VR.
